song_details.name: Keraya Neeranu
song_details.arohanam: S R1 M1 P D1 S
song_details.avarohanam: S D1 P M1 G3 R1 S

content.swara: D S  S  | D P | M  P || D D P | M M | P  P ||
Ke re  ya | Nee - | ra nu || Ke re ge | chal - | li - ||
content.sahitya: ... while worshipping with the intention of obtaining the boons (“varava padeda rante”) from the god.

content.swara: D D  S | D P | M P || D D P | M G | R S ||
Va ra  va | pa de | da va || ran - te | Kaa - | ni ro ||
content.sahitya: In a similar manner the life given as a considerate bequest  (“karunadolaada bhagyavu”) by Hari (“hari
